1871570.name: Robozarro 2: Operation Atlantic
1871570.description:
In Robozarro 2: Operation Atlantic, robot duo B0-3 and 0-R4 engage in explosive action, 2D platforming, and physics-based environmental puzzles, as they embark on an epic, alien-infested adventure through an urban wasteland known as “The Nec”.

Incoming Transmission...

  • The Grab N Blast is back! Grab weapons from enemies, forcing them to change up their tactics, or use objects in the environment as explosive weapons or defensive barriers, to give yourself the upper-hand!

  • Hacking: Collect "Hack Chips" and use them to hack open doors, chests, and set traps on the battlefield! Hacking sends you into a retro-inspired, maze-like minigame, where you'll have to reach the "Goal" while laying bombs, busting through walls, avoiding enemies, and earning additional "Time" resources.

  • RPG-Lite: Collect junk, scavenge the environment, and visit shop keepers to earn Elemental Attack Chips and level up your stats!

  • World Building: Bunker down in "The Gut", your base of operations, and perform side-quests for its quirky denizens to learn even more about them. When exploring the world and progressing the story, you'll venture through a multitude of post-apocalyptic locations, all inspired by real-life Chicago-area neighborhoods. Players can freely fast-travel between unlocked locations by accessing the World Map!

End Transmission.
